rulings.Case Title: JUMPSTART SPORTS CLUB INC. INDIVIDUALLY AND et al VS. NORTHERN CALIFORNIA VOLLEYBALL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings And Req. For Judicial Ntc
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, NOVEMBER 26, 2007, LINE 2, DEFENDANT NORTHERN CALIFORNIA VOLLEYBALL ASSOCIATION'S notice of motion For Judgment On The Pleadings And Req. For Judicial Notice IS DENIED. IT IS MOOT BECAUSE PLAINTIFF'S CORPORATE POWERS HAVE BEEN REINSTATED. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: JUMPSTART SPORTS CLUB INC. INDIVIDUALLY AND et al VS. NORTHERN CALIFORNIA VOLLEYBALL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON MONDAY, NOVEMBER 26, 2007, LINE 2, DEFENDANT NORTHERN CALIFORNIA VOLLEYBALL ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. UNDER CALIFORNIA DENTAL ASSOCIATION V AMERICAN DENTAL ASSOCIATION (1979) 23C, 3RD 346, THE COURT INITIALLY DETERMINES WHETHER JUDICIAL ACTION IS APPROPRIATE BECAUSE THE CHALLENGED ACTION "PLAINLY CONTRAVENES" THE ASSOCIATION'S BY-LAWS. DEFENDANT'S INTERPRETATION OF ITS BY-LAWS WAS REASONABLE AND SO THE COURT NEED NOT BALANCE THE INTERESTS OF THE PARTIES. FURTHER, THE DECISION IN OAKLAND RAIDER V NFL (2005) 131 CAL. APP 4TH 621 PROVIDES SUPPORT FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT COURTS OUGHT NOT TO ENGAGE IS SUCH INTRA-ASSOCIATION DISPUTES. THE REQUEST TO CONTINUE IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO MAKE THE REQUIRED SHOWING UNDER CCP 437C. =(302/PJM/PB)
